english_text: Don't cross your legs in front of elders
Don't talk with your mouth full
Wait for elders to eat first
Don't make loud noises at night
Don't interrupt when someone is speaking
Give up your seat for the elderly
Don't blow your nose at the table
Use two hands to receive something
Don't put your elbows on the table
Apologize when you make a mistake
Turn off your phone in quiet places
Offer your help to those in need
Don't use your phone during meals
Don't speak ill of others behind their back
Don't raise your voice in public
